notes:
Ember 1.2.1

• Fix: opening Settings could crash the app ("Ember quit unexpectedly") — the Offline Mode toggle was wired to a missing handler. Settings now opens reliably.
• Hardening: Ember now catches unexpected errors and logs them (ember-crash.log) instead of quitting, and any settings section that fails to load no longer takes the whole window down.

Includes everything from 1.2.0: works 100% offline, the free offline brain (Ollama) can drive your computer + analyse images, countdown timers, the newbie Setup Tour, and the workflow-recorder macOS crash fix.
